com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseRequest<ManageRequest>
      • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable
    Enclosing class:
    AuthorizeCard

    public static class AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
extends BaseRequest<ManageRequest>
    The request data for Authorize Card command.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AuthorizeRequest() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      TerminalConfiguration getTerminalConfiguration() 
      protected ManageRequest pack() 
      void setAmount(java.lang.String amount) 
      void setCashBackAmt(java.lang.String cashBackAmt) 
      void setContinuousScreen(java.lang.String continuousScreen)
      ‘0’ default.
      void setKeySlot(java.lang.String keySlot)
      This field is effective only when ONLINE PIN is required.
      void setKsnFlag(java.lang.String ksnFlag)
      Indicate whether to increase KSN, when MAC key type is 1(DUKPT Key)
      void setMerchantDecision(java.lang.String merchantDecision)
      0: default (no merchant decision)
      1: force online
      2: force decline
      3: force acceptance
      void setPinAlgorithm(java.lang.String pinAlgorithm)
      When the Encryption Type is 1(DES DUKPT) or 2(Master Session DES):
      The value is as below, default to 0:
      0: ISO9564_0
      1: ISO9564_1
      3: ISO9564_3
      When the Encryption Type is 3(AES DUKPT):
      The value is as below, default to 4:
      4: ISO9564_4
      void setPinBypassFlag(java.lang.String pinBypassFlag)
      This field is effective only when PIN is required.
      void setPinEncryptionType(java.lang.String pinEncryptionType)
      This field is effective only when ONLINE PIN is required.
      void setPinMaxLength(java.lang.String pinMaxLength)
      This field is effective only when PIN is required.
      void setPinMinLength(java.lang.String pinMinLength)
      This field is effective only when PIN is required.
      void setPinpadType(java.lang.String pinpadType)
      0: Internal Pinpad.(default)
      1: External Pinpad (A80 only, if use other device will return param error).
      2: RNIB Pinpad mode.
      3: External Pinpad first.
      void setTagList(java.lang.String tagList)
      Default tag list:
      void setTimeOut(int timeOut)
      Should be [0, 3000]

    • Constructor Detail

      • AuthorizeRequest

        public AuthorizeRequest()

    • Method Detail

      • setAmount

        public void setAmount(java.lang.String amount)
        Parameters:
        amount - Transaction total amount $$$$$$$CC.

      • setCashBackAmt

        public void setCashBackAmt(java.lang.String cashBackAmt)
        Parameters:
        cashBackAmt - Cash back amount $$$$$$$CC.

      • setMerchantDecision

        public void setMerchantDecision(java.lang.String merchantDecision)
        0: default (no merchant decision)
        1: force online
        2: force decline
        3: force acceptance
        Parameters:
        merchantDecision - Merchant decision to the current transaction. The default value is 0.

      • setPinEncryptionType

        public void setPinEncryptionType(java.lang.String pinEncryptionType)
        This field is effective only when ONLINE PIN is required.
        The value is as below:
        1: DUKPT.(DES DUKPT)
        2: Master Session DES
        3: AES DUKPT
        Parameters:
        pinEncryptionType - The encryption type for PINBLOCK calculation. Default as 1.

      • setKeySlot

        public void setKeySlot(java.lang.String keySlot)
        This field is effective only when ONLINE PIN is required.
        Key slot number, start from 1. Default to 1.
        Pax Platform Pax Models Valid value
        MonitorS80,S300,S500,SP30,D210. 1-40(DES DUKPT and Master Session)
        Prolin D200,D220, S920,Q20,Q30,Px5,Px7. 1-99 (DES DUKPT and Master Session) 1-40(AES DUKPT)
        PayDroid A60, A80, A920, A930, Aries Series. 1-99 (DES DUKPT and Master Session) 1-40(AES DUKPT)
        Parameters:
        keySlot - Slot index of the key used to calculate PINBLOCK. start from 1. Default to 1

      • setPinMinLength

        public void setPinMinLength(java.lang.String pinMinLength)
        This field is effective only when PIN is required. The value must be not less 4, and must be not more than pin max length. Default to 4.
        Parameters:
        pinMinLength - MIN length for PIN entry. Default as 4.

      • setPinMaxLength

        public void setPinMaxLength(java.lang.String pinMaxLength)
        This field is effective only when PIN is required. The value must be not less pin min length, and must be not more than 12. Default to 12.
        Parameters:
        pinMaxLength - MAX length for PIN entry. Default to 12

      • setPinBypassFlag

        public void setPinBypassFlag(java.lang.String pinBypassFlag)
        This field is effective only when PIN is required.

        Allow user to bypass the PIN.
        The value is as below, default to 0:
        0: not allow PIN Bypass
        1: bypass offline PIN automatically
        2: bypass online PIN automatically
        3: bypass both offline and online PINs automatically.
        4: allow user to bypass both offline and online PINs

        Parameters:
        pinBypassFlag - Flag indicates whether NULL PIN allowed during PIN entry.

      • setPinAlgorithm

        public void setPinAlgorithm(java.lang.String pinAlgorithm)
        When the Encryption Type is 1(DES DUKPT) or 2(Master Session DES):
        The value is as below, default to 0:
        0: ISO9564_0
        1: ISO9564_1
        3: ISO9564_3
        When the Encryption Type is 3(AES DUKPT):
        The value is as below, default to 4:
        4: ISO9564_4
        Parameters:
        pinAlgorithm - PIN Algorithm.

      • getTerminalConfiguration

        public TerminalConfiguration getTerminalConfiguration()
        Returns:
        A TerminalConfiguration to set the config.

      • setTagList

        public void setTagList(java.lang.String tagList)
        Default tag list:

        82 Application Interchange Profile (AIP)
        84 Dedicated File (DF) Name
        95 Terminal Verification Result (TVR)
        9B Transaction Status Information (TSI)
        5F20 Cardholder Name
        9C Transaction Type
        9F07 Application Usage Control (AUC)
        9F08 Application Version Number (ICC)
        9F09 Application Version Number (Terminal)
        9F0D Issuer Action Code (IAC) - default
        9F0E Issuer Action Code (IAC) - Denial
        9F0F Issuer Action Code (IAC) - Online
        9F10 Issuer Application Data (IAD)
        9F1A Terminal Country Code
        9F26 Application Cryptogram (AC)
        9F27 Cryptogram Information Data (IAD)
        9F33 Terminal Capabilities
        9F34 Cardholder Verification (CVM) Results
        9F35 Terminal Type
        9F36 Application Transaction Counter (ATC)
        9F37 Unpredictable Number
        9F40 Additional Terminal Capabilities

        Tag list to be requested in the response message. All the tags are consecutive without any separator. If this field is missing, terminal will return the EMV data based on the default list
        Parameters:
        tagList -

      • setTimeOut

        public void setTimeOut(int timeOut)
        Should be [0, 3000]
        Parameters:
        timeOut - in 0.1s

      • setContinuousScreen

        public void setContinuousScreen(java.lang.String continuousScreen)
        ‘0’ default.
        ‘1’ after command is executed display doesn't go back to idle screen.
        Parameters:
        continuousScreen - Attribute: n1

      • setPinpadType

        public void setPinpadType(java.lang.String pinpadType)
        0: Internal Pinpad.(default)
        1: External Pinpad (A80 only, if use other device will return param error).
        2: RNIB Pinpad mode.
        3: External Pinpad first. If external pinpad is present, use external pinpad. If not, use internal pinpad. (A80 only, if use other device will return param error).
        Parameters:
        pinpadType - Attribute: n1
        Since:
        V1.02.01

      • setKsnFlag

        public void setKsnFlag(java.lang.String ksnFlag)
        Indicate whether to increase KSN, when MAC key type is 1(DUKPT Key)

        Default KSN flag is 1(Increase)
        0: Not increase.
        1: Increase.

        Parameters:
        ksnFlag - Attribute: n1
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • pack

        protected ManageRequest pack()
        Specified by:
        pack in class BaseRequest<ManageRequest>
